name: Dalrymple Bay Infrastructure Limited
analysis: DBI has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$5.6000. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$5.6000, stop A$5.1251, target A$6.5497. Risk/reward is 2.00:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
